prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低录取位次分别为约501名→872名→984名→1141名→1257名，呈持续后移趋势，近5年累计后移约756名；2025年基准位次约1257名，近3年每年 后移约100–150名，后移速度基本稳定；该校在广东物理类招生计划逐年扩招：2021年5人→2022年11人→2023年15人→2024年17人→2025年19人→2026年（招生计划 文件）20人，2026年较2025年小幅扩招1人（+5.3%），扩招幅度有限，对位次的稀释作用较小。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 上海交通大学医学院依托上海交通大学（985、211、双一流，软 科主榜约第4名），属于国内顶尖医学院校层次，对高分考生吸引力极强，报考竞争基数大；上海交通大学（主校）2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及 学术不端与学校管理事件；抖音热度排名第42位（较热），整体曝光度较高但负面舆情可能对报考心理产生一定抑制作用。医学院本身无独立声誉记录；临床医 学（A+）、口腔医学（A+）、护理学（A-）、基础医学（A-）等学科评估等级顶尖，与招生专业高度匹配，对考生有强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学2024年专业热度 评估为"推荐"（偏热），口腔医学"推荐"（偏热），护理学"推荐"（偏热），医学类专业整体社会热度持续偏高；广东省2026年物理类考生约456000人，较2025年440208人增加约 3.6%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争；省控线近年稳定在本科批436分左右，无明显波动；上海交通大学医学院在广东招生占比从2021年约1.59%（5/314）升至2025年 约3.88%（19/490），占比持续上升，反映该校对广东生源的重视程度提高，但跨省报考上海的地域偏好对广东考生影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、202 6年招生计划小幅扩招（+1人）、广东物理类考生增加约3.6%以及医学类专业热度持续偏高，预计2026年竞争较2025年进一步加剧；在2025年基准1257名基础上，预测最低位次约1 312名，区间1155–1469名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（本博连读）
- 口腔医学（5+3一体化）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 临床医学（5年）
- 临床医学（本博连读法语班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 临床医学（英语班/5年英语班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间1155–1469名内，建议以二档临床医学（5年）为主攻方向、一档本博连读和口腔医学为冲刺目标、三档英语班为稳妥保底；位次明显优于区间下限（1155名以内 ）可重点冲击一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for the Physics Category were approximately 501 → 872 → 984 → 1141 → 1257, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 756 places over the past 5 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1257, with an annual backward shift of about 100–150 places in the last 3 years, and the rate of backward shift is basically stable; the university's enrollment plan for the Physics Category in Guangdong has been gradually expanding: 5 in 2021 → 11 in 2022 → 15 in 2023 → 17 in 2024 → 19 in 2025 → 20 in 2026 (according to the enrollment plan document), with a small expansion of 1 place (+5.3%) in 2026 compared to 2025, and the expansion is limited, having a minor dilutive effect on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine is affiliated with Shanghai Jiao Tong University (985, 211, Double First-Class, ranked about 4th in the Soft Science main ranking), belonging to the top tier of domestic medical schools, with strong appeal to high-scoring candidates and a large competitive base; the reputation evaluation of Shanghai Jiao Tong University (main campus) during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct and school management incidents; Douyin popularity ranking is 42nd (relatively hot), with overall high exposure but negative public opinion may have a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology. The medical school itself has no independent reputation record; clinical medicine (A+), stomatology (A+), nursing (A-), basic medicine (A-), and other discipline evaluation grades are top-notch, highly matching the enrollment majors, and have strong appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity evaluation of clinical medicine is 'recommended' (relatively hot), stomatology 'recommended' (relatively hot), nursing 'recommended' (relatively hot), and the overall social popularity of medical majors remains high; in 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Guangdong is about 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% compared to 440,208 in 2025, with the expansion of the candidate pool intensifying competition; the provincial control line has been stable at around 436 points for the undergraduate batch in recent years, with no significant fluctuations; the proportion of Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine's enrollment in Guangdong has risen from about 1.59% (5/314) in 2021 to about 3.88% (19/490) in 2025, reflecting the university's increased emphasis on Guangdong students, but the regional preference for cross-provincial applications to Shanghai has limited impact on Guangdong candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the small expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+1 place), the increase of about 3.6% in Physics Category candidates in Guangdong, and the persistently high popularity of medical majors, it is expected that competition in 2026 will further intensify compared to 2025; based on the 2025 baseline of 1257, the predicted minimum ranking is about 1312, with a range of 1155–1469.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (Bachelor-Master-Doctor Continuous Program)
- Stomatology (5+3 Integrated Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Clinical Medicine (5-Year Program)
- Clinical Medicine (Bachelor-Master-Doctor Continuous Program French Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (English Class/5-Year English Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 1155–1469, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Clinical Medicine (5-Year Program) as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 Bachelor-Master-Doctor Continuous Program and Stomatology as reach goals, and use Tier 3 English Class as a safe backup; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 1155), focus on attacking Tier 1 flagship majors.

_translation.university_name_en: Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine
